item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 9min HAWKINS IN CONTROL!
A scrappy session but Barry Hawkins has a commanding 7-2 lead over Matthew St
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 9min HAWKINS IN CONTROL!
A scrappy session but Barry Hawkins has a commanding 7-2 lead over Matthew Stevens.
They finish up Sunday afternoon #WorldChampionship 1 1 7 821

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 13min 𝗘𝗡𝗗 𝗢𝗙 𝗦𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡
Barry Hawkins - Matthew Stevens
The Hawk recovers from a slow start
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 13min 𝗘𝗡𝗗 𝗢𝗙 𝗦𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡
Barry Hawkins - Matthew Stevens
The Hawk recovers from a slow start to reel off straight frames and take control in the battle of the former finalists
They resume at 2.30pm on Sunday 1 309
